TA
Tikur Abay Customer Portal

Follow the shipment from origin to receipt confirmation.

Customer access is focused on shipment visibility, document review, receipt confirmation, support, and empty-return follow-up across the full Tikur Abay cargo journey.

Shipment visibility that matches operationsSee origin, vessel, Djibouti release, inland transit, delivery, and empty return in one customer-facing flow.
Documents stay linked to the shipmentBL, invoice, packing list, customs packet, POD, and return receipt remain visible in the same record.
Receipt confirmation is part of closureCustomers confirm clean delivery or raise shortage and damage before the shipment can fully close.
Customer Sign In

Open your shipment workspace

Sign in with your assigned customer access credentials.

Customer access is limited to shipment tracking, documents, support, receipt confirmation, and empty-return visibility.
